title: Oraculus DI Audit Report - Example
author: Audit Team
executive_summary: This report presents findings from a comprehensive audit of documents using the Oraculus DI Auditor four fault-line framework. The audit reviewed documents for DOJ certification compliance, IRB consent requirements, infrastructure policy adherence, and federal grant incentive structures. Critical findings require immediate legal review and remediation.

methodology.ingestion: Manual document upload and triage using triage.py script
methodology.extraction: OCR text extraction via pytesseract for scanned documents; native text extraction for digital PDFs
methodology.analysis: Four fault-line framework: DOJ certification, IRB consent (28 C.F.R. Part 46), infrastructure policy, federal grant incentives
methodology.review: Manual review by qualified auditors with automated flagging and severity classification
methodology.limitations: This audit is based on the documents available at the time of review. Additional documents may exist that were not included in this audit. All findings should be verified by qualified legal counsel.

compliance.doj_certification: All documents were reviewed for DOJ certification requirements. Missing certifications were flagged for immediate follow-up.
compliance.irb_compliance: IRB approval and informed consent documentation were verified for all research-related documents. Non-compliant documents were flagged as high or critical severity.
compliance.infrastructure: Infrastructure and procurement documents were assessed for compliance with federal acquisition regulations (FAR) and facility standards.
compliance.federal_grants: Grant funding mechanisms were reviewed for proper authorization, budget alignment, and conflict of interest management.

recommendations.title: Immediate Legal Review of Critical Findings
recommendations.description: All critical severity findings must be reviewed by qualified legal counsel within 48 hours. These findings represent potential legal violations or significant compliance risks.
actions: Obtain legal opinion on each critical finding
Document all remediation actions in manifest chain-of-custody

recommendations.title: IRB Compliance Remediation
recommendations.description: Documents flagged for IRB non-compliance must be addressed through proper IRB channels. Research activities should be suspended pending IRB approval where required.

recommendations.title: Infrastructure Policy Review
recommendations.description: Infrastructure and procurement documents should undergo comprehensive policy review to ensure FAR compliance and proper contractor oversight.

recommendations.title: Establish Regular Audit Schedule
recommendations.description: Implement a regular audit schedule using the Oraculus DI Auditor framework to prevent future compliance issues.
actions: Integrate findings into compliance management system
